headline: Evaluating Workday (WDAY) After Mixed Recent Returns And A Debate Over Valuation Multiples
summary: Recent performance snapshot and context Workday (WDAY) has drawn investor attention in recent trading, with the stock up about 0.1% over the past day, roughly 0.2% over the past week, and about 0.2% over the past month. Over longer periods, returns have been weaker, with the stock down about 24% year to date, roughly 37% over the past year, around 26% over the past 3 months, and about 30% over the past 5 years. This mixed performance backdrop is the starting point for assessing how the...
